---
title: 'Songs Enrich the Word in your heart'
date: '2011-10-07T03:26:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '7142843207313061639'
blogger_filename: '/2011/10/songs-enrich-word-in-your-heart.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Ministry'
---

<br />
<br />
<br />
<span class="Apple-style-span" style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial; font-size: 12px;"></span><br />
<ul id="Page-1" style="display: block; list-style-image: initial; list-style-position: initial; list-style-type: none; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 10px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;">
<li style="list-style-image: initial; list-style-position: initial; list-style-type: none; margin-bottom: 15px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;"><h4 class="ResultTitle" style="clear: left; font-size: 17px; font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;">
<a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/nkjv/ephesians/5-19.html" style="color: #336699; text-decoration: none;">Ephesians 5:19 NKJV</a></h4>
<div class="ResultText" style="font-size: 14px; margin-bottom: 3px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;">
speaking to one another in psalms and hymns and&nbsp;<span class="Highlight" style="background-color: #ffff96; font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 2px; padding-right: 2px; padding-top: 0px;">spiritual</span>&nbsp;<span class="Highlight" style="background-color: #ffff96; font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 2px; padding-right: 2px; padding-top: 0px;">songs</span>, singing and making melody in your heart to the Lord,</div>
<div class="QuickLinks" style="color: #cdcdcd; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;">
<a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/nkjv/ephesians/5.html" style="color: #336699; text-decoration: none;">Read Ephesians 5</a>&nbsp;|&nbsp;<a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/parallel-bible/passage.aspx?q=Ephesians+5:19" style="color: #336699; text-decoration: none;">View in parallel</a>&nbsp;|&nbsp;<a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/ephesians/5-19-compare.html" style="color: #336699; text-decoration: none;">Compare Translations</a></div>
</li>
<li style="list-style-image: initial; list-style-position: initial; list-style-type: none; margin-bottom: 15px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;"><h4 class="ResultTitle" style="clear: left; font-size: 17px; font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;">
<a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/nkjv/colossians/3-16.html" style="color: #336699; text-decoration: none;">Colossians 3:16 NKJV</a></h4>
<div class="ResultText" style="font-size: 14px; margin-bottom: 3px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;">
Let the word of Christ dwell in you richly in all wisdom, teaching and admonishing one another in psalms and hymns and&nbsp;<span class="Highlight" style="background-color: #ffff96; font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 2px; padding-right: 2px; padding-top: 0px;">spiritual</span>&nbsp;<span class="Highlight" style="background-color: #ffff96; font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 2px; padding-right: 2px; padding-top: 0px;">songs</span>, singing with grace in your hearts to the Lord.</div>
<div class="QuickLinks" style="color: #cdcdcd; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;">
<a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/nkjv/colossians/3.html" style="color: #336699; text-decoration: none;">Read Colossians 3</a>&nbsp;|&nbsp;<a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/parallel-bible/passage.aspx?q=Colossians+3:16" style="color: #336699; text-decoration: none;">View in parallel</a>&nbsp;|&nbsp;<a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/colossians/3-16-compare.html" style="color: #336699; text-decoration: none;">Compare Translations</a></div>
</li>
</ul>
